name: Short-term spermidine extract appeared tolerable in older adults
summary: A small 3-month human pilot supports tolerability of spermidine-rich plant extract but does not establish efficacy.
statement: A 3-month randomized Phase II pilot in 30 older adults reported no safety-parameter differences between spermidine-rich extract and placebo and high compliance.
population_or_model: Older adults with subjective cognitive decline
caveats: The study was small and primarily supports tolerability, not clinical benefit.
The source also includes animal safety data, which should not be treated as human efficacy evidence.
